description: Create a Review of Systems (ROS) template named 'Cardio_Consult' in the NOSH ChartingSystem. The template must include the following symptom items: Fatigue (General/Constitutional); Chest pain, Palpitations, and Edema (Cardiovascular); and Shortness of breath or Dyspnea (Respiratory). Administrator credentials: Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!.
